title: Create: Changed
description: An addon mod for the Changed and Create Minecraft mods.
body:
This mod is in really early development and features are subject to change at any time.

This is a mod that introduces functionality to the Create and Changed mods to allow them to work together. This adds recipes and (later on blocks) that allow items from the Changed mod (along with Changed addon Plus and Changed additions) to be made using the Create mod.
